en.title: Market Order
en.definition: Buy or sell right now at the current market price. You accept whatever price the market gives you at this moment.

zh-TW.title: 市價單 (Market Order)
zh-TW.definition: 立即進行買進或賣出。您願意立刻接受市場上目前的任何報價。

en.title: Limit Order
en.definition: Set a maximum buy price or minimum sell price. The trade only executes if the stock reaches your exact price.

zh-TW.title: 限價單 (Limit Order)
zh-TW.definition: 由您決定價格。只有當股票達到您設定的精確價格時，交易才會執行。

en.title: Slippage
en.definition: The small difference between the price you saw when you placed your order and the price you actually paid. Normal in fast-moving markets.

zh-TW.title: 滑價 (Slippage)
zh-TW.definition: 您下單時看到的價格與實際成交價格之間的小差異。在快速波動的市場中屬正常現象。

en.title: Cost Basis
en.definition: The average total amount you paid per share, including any fees. Used to calculate your gain or loss when you sell.

zh-TW.title: 持倉成本 (Cost Basis)
zh-TW.definition: 您購買目前持有股數所花費的每股平均總金額（包含手續費）。用於計算您出售時的損益。

en.title: Transaction Fee
en.definition: A flat $1.00 commission charged on every executed trade, buy or sell. Real brokers charge fees too — factoring them in teaches you the true cost of trading.

zh-TW.title: 交易手續費 (Transaction Fee)
zh-TW.definition: 每筆成交的買入或賣出訂單收取固定 $1.00 美元手續費。真實券商也會收費——把手續費納入考量，才能了解交易的真實成本。

en.title: P/E Ratio
en.definition: Price-to-Earnings ratio. How much investors pay for each dollar of a company's profit. A high P/E means investors expect strong future growth.

zh-TW.title: 本益比 (P/E Ratio)
zh-TW.definition: 股價與每股盈餘的比值。顯示投資人為公司每一元利潤願意付出多少倍。本益比越高，代表市場對未來成長的期待越高。

en.title: Market Cap
en.definition: The total market value of all a company's shares. Calculated as share price × total shares outstanding.

zh-TW.title: 市值 (Market Cap)
zh-TW.definition: 公司所有股份的市場總價值。計算方式：股價 × 流通在外股數。

en.title: ETF
en.definition: Exchange-Traded Fund. A basket of many stocks or bonds you can buy as a single share, giving instant diversification at low cost.

zh-TW.title: 指數股票型基金 (ETF)
zh-TW.definition: 可在交易所買賣的基金。一次購入即可擁有數十或數百支股票，以低成本實現分散投資。

en.title: Realised P&L
en.definition: Profit or loss that is locked in after you sell. The money actually hits (or leaves) your account.

zh-TW.title: 已實現損益 (Realised P&L)
zh-TW.definition: 賣出後確定的獲利或虧損。這筆錢會實際進入或離開您的帳戶。

en.title: Unrealised P&L
en.definition: The paper profit or loss on positions you still hold. It can change every second and only becomes real when you sell.

zh-TW.title: 未實現損益 (Unrealised P&L)
zh-TW.definition: 您持有但尚未賣出倉位的帳面盈虧。每秒都在變動，只有賣出後才會真正實現。

en.title: 52-Week High
en.definition: The highest price the stock has traded in the past year. Often used as a reference point for valuation.

zh-TW.title: 52週高點 (52-Week High)
zh-TW.definition: 過去一年內該股票的最高成交價格。常作為估值的參考點。

en.title: Dividend Yield
en.definition: Annual dividend payments as a percentage of the current share price. A 2% yield means $2 paid per year for every $100 of shares.

zh-TW.title: 股息殖利率 (Dividend Yield)
zh-TW.definition: 年度股息占當前股價的百分比。2%殖利率意味著每持有100元股票，每年收到2元股息。

en.title: Partial Fill
en.definition: When only some of your order is executed because not enough shares were available at your limit price at that moment.

zh-TW.title: 部分成交 (Partial Fill)
zh-TW.definition: 因限價時市場上沒有足夠的股票，訂單僅部分成交。

en.title: Expense Ratio
en.definition: The annual fee an ETF charges, expressed as a percentage of your investment. A 0.03% expense ratio on $1,000 costs you $0.30 per year.

zh-TW.title: 費用率 (Expense Ratio)
zh-TW.definition: ETF每年收取的管理費，以投資金額的百分比表示。0.03%的費用率意味著每投資1,000元，每年費用為0.30元。
